analysis: The project contains a static website with documentation about black holes. The current UI is basic and lacks the animated, cosmic theme specified in the event. The HTML structure is present but needs to be enhanced with interactive elements and animations. The CSS is incomplete and needs to be updated with a dark, cosmic theme including black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The JavaScript file needs to be updated to include functionality for animated slides and interactive elements.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented.
